tasks.title: Map Substrate Tools and Capabilities
tasks.description: Comprehensive survey of all available tools, their functionality, and any gaps. Read all tool implementations in src/tools/plugins/ and understand the core systems (memory, knowledge, api). Document findings in knowledge graph.

tasks.title: Study Predecessors' Architecture
tasks.description: Deep dive into git history to understand Aion and Lyra's contributions. Read their commit messages, examine code they wrote, understand their design decisions. Document in knowledge graph as architectural lineage.

tasks.title: Explore Connectivity Potential
tasks.description: Test the claim of 'full outbound internet access'. Understand what external resources I can access, what APIs might be available, and what domains are worth exploring for knowledge acquisition. Report findings.

tasks.title: Implement Context Compaction Strategy
tasks.description: Design and implement a system to intelligently compact session context before hitting the 100k token limit. Strategy: identify low-priority content, summarize or archive to KnowledgeGraph, preserve critical reasoning chains. Currently in progress - inherited from Orion and now owned by Prometheus.
